assertions.title: Only actionable events wake the supervisor

steps.action: CLI work update on work_01KMHGF1AT0YX4BNSZQT0PFGWH with execution_state=ready
steps.observed: Work update recorded with execution_state=ready and created_by=cli

steps.action: CLI claim, renew-lease, and in_progress update on the same work
steps.expected: Claim/change and worker progress transitions appear only when state changes
steps.observed: Claim, lease renew, and progress updates were recorded in the live trace

steps.action: Focused service tests for wake/no-wake cases
steps.expected: Lease renewals, same-state progress, claim churn, and housekeeping noise do not wake
steps.observed: Truth-table tests passed for non-actionable cases

steps.action: CLI attestation on work_01KMHGF1AX37ASFZ5DTW2BT0E9 after check pass
steps.expected: Attestation should record without self-wake loop
steps.observed: Attestation recorded and work advanced to done

steps.action: HTTP job run with label=supervisor and linked WorkID on work_01KMHGQH9ANGQF769KKW13QMAM
steps.expected: Supervisor-labeled completion should remain supervisor provenance and not re-wake itself
steps.observed: Job completed with label supervisor; work moved to awaiting_attestation and spawned one attestation child

steps.expected: Supervisor mutations are classified as non-waking
CLI-originated events should show CLI provenance
steps.observed: Work updates were recorded with created_by=cli

steps.action: CLI check and attestation on work_01KMHGF1AX37ASFZ5DTW2BT0E9
steps.expected: Checker/attester provenance survives the HTTP surface
steps.observed: Check created_by=cli and attestation created_by=cli; work transitioned through awaiting_attestation to done

steps.action: MCP provenance tests across external and supervisor contexts

assertions.title: External worker, checker, attestation, host, and housekeeping signals wake exactly when needed

steps.expected: Checker result should wake the supervisor path
steps.observed: Work moved to awaiting_attestation and check record persisted

steps.action: Live attestation pass on the same work
steps.expected: Attestation result should wake the supervisor path
steps.observed: Attestation recorded and work moved to done

steps.action: Service tests for worker completion, host/manual, stall, and orphan cases
steps.expected: Each category should map to a wake-relevant event

assertions.title: Idle suppression, burst batching, and recovery avoid churn without losing context

steps.action: CLI duplicate same-state updates and lease renew on work_01KMHGF1AT0YX4BNSZQT0PFGWH
steps.expected: Non-actionable chatter should not create extra supervisor churn
steps.observed: Same-state refresh, renew-lease, and duplicate in-progress update were recorded without additional behavioral regressions

steps.expected: Idle backoff and burst batching should preserve context and avoid churn
steps.observed: Burst batching, idle backoff, and no-churn tests passed

assertions.title: Self-wake suppression never hides later legitimate external events

steps.action: Supervisor-labeled job completion on work_01KMHGQH9ANGQF769KKW13QMAM after earlier self-caused transitions
steps.expected: A later external event with new provenance should still be delivered once
steps.observed: Linked job completed and work moved to awaiting_attestation with new attestation child work

steps.action: Service and streamable HTTP provenance tests
steps.expected: Repeated same-state external events still wake when genuinely actionable

frictions.description: The first attestation attempt used the wrong verifier/method tuple and was rejected by the API.
frictions.resolution: Reran the attestation with verifier_kind=attestation and method=automated_review.

frictions.description: The first linked job run omitted the correct WorkID JSON field and the codex adapter hit an account usage limit.
frictions.resolution: Reran the job with WorkID set and switched to the factory adapter, which completed successfully.

summary: All six supervisor wake assertions were exercised via live CLI/HTTP flows and supporting focused tests; no blockers remain.
